name: @jeswr/kernel-e5-prep
description: E5 adapter + shuffled-kernel control prep (docs/poc-design.md Phase E, E5 rev 2; bead kernel-of-truth-c24): seeded seen/nonce concept selection over the E4 vocabulary, full-D kernel vectors through the pinned X4 JL 8192->576 projection, forced-choice definitional item construction against the E4 hash-published gloss set, and the pre-registration manifest. The GPU runner lives in runner/.

scripts.select: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/selectConcepts.js
scripts.vectors: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/vectors.js
scripts.items: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/items.js
scripts.inputs: npm run select && npm run vectors && npm run items
scripts.test: npm run build && nice -n 10 node --test dist/test/*.test.js
